name: Pan-Fried Veggie Wontons with Sesame Dip
recipeIngredient: Red pepper, crushed or 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes
Crushed red pepper or to taste, 1/4 tsp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all dip ingredients and place in the center of a serving platter.
2. In another bowl, mix shredded cabbage, carrots, minced green onions, chopped cilantro, minced garlic, crushed red pepper (or to taste), soy sauce, and sesame oil until well combined.
3. Place a small spoonful of filling in each wonton wrapper and fold the corners together to form a triangle. Fold in the sides like an envelope. Repeat with remaining wrappers.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a nonstick frying pan over medium-high heat until hot. Gently place the wontons in the pan, cooking until bottoms are golden and crusty, about 3 minutes.
5. Pour water into the pan, cover, and steam for about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and arrange the wontons on the serving platter.
Makes 24 wontons. Per serving: 38 calories; 1 gram protein; 1 gram fat; 6 grams carbs; 0 cholesterol; 130 milligrams sodium; less than 0.2 grams fiber; vegan.
